subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qulí! My Name Mahdí, upon him be My glory and loving-kindness, conveyed thy letter unto the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قلی اسمی مهدی علیه بهائی و عنایتی نامه ات را بساحت اقدس ارسال نمود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
